method: INSPIRE-HEP API + arXiv WebFetch verification (arXiv API blocked HTTP 429 from VPS)
context: Closing residual gaps in /tmp/T2_bianchi_extension after Banerjee-Niedermaier 2023 (Bianchi I T^3) Hadamard SLE construction.

top_papers.title: States of Low Energy on Bianchi I spacetimes
top_papers.relevance: Reference Hadamard SLE on Bianchi I T^3. Explicit conclusion (line 2338): 'A natural extension is to other homogeneous spacetimes in the Bianchi classification ... For type VIII, IX the harmonic analysis is known. ... A generalization to such backgrounds would seem relevant and feasible.' Has not been done.

top_papers.title: States of Low Energy in Homogeneous and Inhomogeneous, Expanding Spacetimes
top_papers.relevance: Theorem (PDF lines 1212-1215): SLE construction Hadamard for ANY globally hyperbolic spacetime with metric ds^2 = dt^2 - c(t)^2 h_ij(x) dx^i dx^j and compact Cauchy hypersurface. Covers ISOTROPIC Bianchi V (compactified H^3) and ISOTROPIC Bianchi IX (S^3) but NOT genuinely anisotropic cases (multiple independent scale factors).

top_papers.title: Adiabatic vacuum states on general spacetime manifolds: Definition, construction, and physical properties
top_papers.relevance: Adiabatic vacua (promote to Hadamard at high order) on any globally hyperbolic spacetime with compact Cauchy surface. Abstract existence covers Bianchi V/IX but no explicit construction.

top_papers.title: Explicit harmonic and spectral analysis in Bianchi I-VII type cosmologies
top_papers.relevance: Provides Plancherel formula and Laplacian eigenfunction expansion on solvable Bianchi I-VII groups (includes Bianchi V). Mathematical input needed for any Bianchi V Hadamard construction. Does NOT itself construct Hadamard states.

top_papers.title: A unified mode decomposition method for physical fields in homogeneous cosmology
top_papers.relevance: Mode decomposition for arbitrary vector-bundle fields on spatially homogeneous spacetimes (incl. all Bianchi types and S^3). Companion to Avetisyan-Verch.

top_papers.title: States of Low Energy on Robertson-Walker Spacetimes
top_papers.relevance: Original SLE construction. RW covers k in {-1, 0, +1} so isotropic Bianchi V/IX limits already Hadamard.

top_papers.title: Distinguished quantum states in a class of cosmological spacetimes and their Hadamard property
top_papers.relevance: Verbatim from abstract: 'specialising to open FRW models, we extend previously obtained results and we prove that the preferred state is of Hadamard form.' Bulk-to-boundary on past cosmological horizon. Covers isotropic Bianchi V (k=-1 FRW).

top_papers.title: Asymptotic velocity domination in quantized polarized Gowdy cosmologies
top_papers.relevance: Banerjee-Niedermaier follow-up extends to inhomogeneous Gowdy T^3 (NOT Bianchi V/IX). Confirms Niedermaier group has not yet done Bianchi V/IX. One of only 4 INSPIRE citations of 2305.11388.

top_papers.title: Hadamard states for the Klein-Gordon equation on Lorentzian manifolds of bounded geometry
top_papers.relevance: Pure Hadamard states on bounded-geometry Cauchy surface. Existence covers Bianchi V/IX in principle, no explicit minimization-defined state.

top_papers.title: Hadamard states for linearized gravity on spacetimes with compact Cauchy surfaces
top_papers.relevance: Hadamard for linearized gravity in harmonic gauge on any Einstein spacetime with compact Cauchy. Tangential to scalar Bianchi V/IX but evidences mainstream existence-theorem trend.

Bianchi_V_compact_H3.anisotropic_three_scale_factors: NO explicit Hadamard SLE construction exists in 2010-2026. INSPIRE 0 hits for 'Hadamard state' + 'Bianchi V'. Bianchi V is type B (no symmetry-reduced action), adds complication.

Bianchi_IX_S3.anisotropic_three_scale_factors: NO explicit Hadamard SLE construction exists in 2010-2026. INSPIRE 0 hits for 'Hadamard state' + 'Bianchi IX'. Bianchi IX is type A (variational principle works) -- direct extension of BN23 should succeed.

verdict_per_bianchi_type.Mixmaster_BKL_chaos: NO papers exist. INSPIRE 0 hits for 'Hadamard state' + 'Mixmaster'. Existing Mixmaster QFT literature treats gravitational mini-superspace (LQC, polymer, affine), not matter QFT on fixed Mixmaster background.

negative_coverage_flags.comment: Banerjee-Niedermaier 2023 explicit statement of 'natural extension' to Bianchi II-IX has not been performed by anyone in the 18 months since publication.

construction_recipe: Step 1: Peter-Weyl decomposition on SU(2) ~ S^3 (Wigner D-matrices); discrete spectrum lambda_j = j(j+2), degeneracy (j+1)^2
Step 2: Wave equation (d_tau^2 + omega_jmm'(tau)^2) T = 0 with Bianchi IX scale-factor mode-mixing C^a_bc
Step 3: bSLE variational setup transfers verbatim from BN23 since Bianchi IX is type A
Step 4: Hadamard property via Brum-Them-style Sobolev wavefront-set bound, S^3 Weyl law N(lambda) ~ lambda^{3/2}/(6 pi^2)
best_path_forward.key_risk: Convergence of bSLE expansion may require restricting to neighborhood of isotropic background to avoid full BKL chaos.
best_path_forward.sequel_route_for_Bianchi_V: First close conformally-isotropic Bianchi V via direct application of Brum-Them. Then use Avetisyan-Verch 1212.6180 to extend to anisotropic, with type-B Lagrangian adaptation (~3-5 months total).

key_recommendation: Pursue Bianchi IX (anisotropic, S^3) as direct sequel to Banerjee-Niedermaier 2305.11388. ~2-4 months, single-author paper feasible. Title 'States of Low Energy on Bianchi IX spacetimes'. This single deliverable closes both the BN23 future-work item and the T2 Bianchi IX gap. Bianchi V residual gap should then be flagged separately as needing 3-5 more months due to type-B complications.
